description: BBC is the UK's public service broadcaster, providing news, radio, music, television, and online media services. Its Radio & Music Services platform supplies metadata and personalization capabilities used by BBC audio products such as radio, podcasts, and music experiences.
summary: bbc.co.uk exposes one documented developer integration surface: the BBC Radio & Music Services HTTP API at `https://rms.api.bbc.co.uk/`, with published reference material and auth requiring a BBC-issued API key, and some endpoints also using a bearer token.
